producers.name: run_client_pipeline.py
producers.purpose: Multi-client E2E pipeline orchestrator. Executes 9 phases from source boundary validation through selector update.

producers.name: run_end_to_end.py
producers.purpose: E2E signal pipeline — invoked as subprocess by phase_06_and_07_e2e (native path). Generates 75.x and 41.x signal artifacts from binding_envelope.json.
producers.notes: Invoked via subprocess by orchestrator native path. Not directly invoked for BlueEdge (conformance path used instead). Callable — file exists.

producers.name: lens_report_generator.py
producers.purpose: LENS report generation — invoked as subprocess by phase_08b_lens_reports. Generates full report tree from vault artifacts.
producers.notes: Invoked via subprocess by orchestrator. Also calls export_graph_state.mjs as sub-subprocess. Callable — file exists.

producers.name: bootstrap_fastapi_40x.py
producers.purpose: FastAPI-specific structural artifact bootstrap. Generates 40.2/40.3/40.4 JSON artifacts from FastAPI raw intake source via static filesystem scan.
producers.reason_if_not: Client-specific (FastAPI only). Hardcoded to FastAPI source path (clients/e65d2f0a.../input/intake/source/fastapi-backend/). Not wired into orchestrator. Cannot be used for other clients without modification.
producers.notes: Created by PI.LENS.FASTAPI.40X-STRUCTURAL-BOOTSTRAP.01. Successfully generated Phase 3 artifacts for FastAPI — Phase 3 PASS confirmed.

producers.name: scan_repository.sh
producers.purpose: k-pi-core self-analysis: scans k-pi-core repo files, produces sorted file list for INT-03 replication.
producers.reason_if_not: Designed for k-pi-core repo (expects 106 files). Outputs stdout file list — not structural_node_inventory.json JSON schema. Hardcoded file count validation for k-pi-core. Cannot produce Phase 3 artifacts for any client source.
producers.notes: Pipeline family: k-pi-core self-analysis (INT-03 replication). Confirmed by PI.LENS.PIPELINE-ORCHESTRATOR-IMPLEMENTATION.01 investigation.

producers.name: extract_entities.py
producers.purpose: k-pi-core self-analysis: extracts CKR entries, Stream references, and named components (PiOS/Signäl/Krayu) from k-pi-core .md files.
producers.reason_if_not: Patterns are k-pi-core-specific governance constructs. Outputs tab-separated entity records to stdout — not JSON structural inventory. Applied to BlueEdge or FastAPI source would produce zero useful matches.

producers.name: classify_files.py
producers.purpose: k-pi-core self-analysis: classifies k-pi-core files into code/documentation/configuration/interface/other categories.
producers.reason_if_not: Expected counts hardcoded for k-pi-core (94 docs, 1 code, 3 config, 0 interface, 8 other). Outputs tab-separated classification to stdout — not JSON. Would produce FAIL warnings on count mismatch for any other client.
producers.notes: Pipeline family: k-pi-core self-analysis (INT-03 replication). Classification logic by file extension is generically applicable but output format incompatible with Phase 3 schema.

producers.name: extract_perm_entities.py
producers.purpose: BlueEdge 40.3 PERM entity validation: checks entity catalog at ~/Projects/krayu-program-intelligence/ against expected entity IDs.
producers.reason_if_not: NOT A GENERATOR. Hardcoded external paths (~/Projects/krayu-program-intelligence/, ~/Projects/blueedge-program-intelligence/source-v3.23/). Paths do not exist in this environment. No CLI arguments accepted. Produces no output files — stdout validation report only.
producers.notes: Pipeline family: external project validation. Cannot be invoked by orchestrator.

producers.name: build_telemetry_artifacts.py
producers.purpose: k-pi-core self-analysis telemetry: re-writes docs/pios/40.4/ markdown files from docs/pios/40.2/ and docs/pios/40.3/ inputs.
producers.reason_if_not: Hardcoded to docs/pios/ paths (k-pi-core self-analysis). REPO_ROOT computed via parents[3] — not parameterizable. load_existing_outputs() reads and re-writes existing 40.4 artifacts (pass-through). Does not produce structural_node_inventory.json or canonical_topology.json.

producers.name: MISSING: Generic structural scanner
producers.purpose: Would generate Phase 3 JSON artifacts from any client source directory. Required to close Step 5 gap for new clients.
producers.reason_if_not: Does not exist. bootstrap_fastapi_40x.py is the only structural scanner in repo and is FastAPI-specific.
producers.notes: This is the primary missing component identified by PI.LENS.PIPELINE-ORCHESTRATOR-IMPLEMENTATION.01 and PI.LENS.E2E-PIPELINE-REALITY-LOCK.01. Required for PI.LENS.STRUCTURAL-SCANNER.GENERIC.01.

producers.name: MISSING: CEU grounding pipeline
producers.path: scripts/pios/ceu_grounding.py or equivalent (DOES NOT EXIST in repo)
producers.purpose: Would generate ceu_grounding_registry.json and grounding_state_v3.json from structural artifacts.
producers.reason_if_not: Does not exist in repo. External contract (PI.BLUEEDGE.CLEAN-INTAKE.01 / integrated pipeline). Scripts from krayu-program-intelligence project not present.
producers.notes: Required to close Step 7 gap. Blocking FastAPI at Phase 4 (GAP-REG-02).

producers.name: MISSING: Integration pipeline / grounding state v3 migrator
producers.reason_if_not: Does not exist in repo. Future contract required (PI.LENS.FASTAPI.CEU-GROUNDING-BOOTSTRAP.01).
producers.notes: Required for FastAPI Phase 4 to pass.

producers.name: MISSING: DOM layer generator
producers.purpose: Would generate dom_path_domain_layer.json for any client source.
producers.reason_if_not: Does not exist in repo. BlueEdge dom_layer was produced by a one-time recompute contract. No generic path.
producers.notes: Required for Step 9. dom_layer_path field also missing from FastAPI source_manifest.json.

summary.gap_count: 4 missing producers required to close the full pipeline chain
